name: my-claude-plugins
description: A curated marketplace for Claude Code plugins — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers that extend Claude Code's capabilities.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: A comprehensive suite of tools for frontend design tasks — UI review, component generation, wireframing, and design system enforcement.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: A skills library and methodology framework by obra (Jesse Vincent) that guides Claude Code through proven software development practices — brainstorming, test-driven development, code review, plan writing, and verification-before-completion.
